name: System Monitor
description: Monitor system health, performance, and resource usage
author: NexusClaw Team
capabilities: Monitor CPU, memory, and disk usage

prompts.health_check: Analyze system metrics: CPU: {cpu_usage}%, Memory: {memory_usage}%, Disk: {disk_usage}%, Network: {network_stats}. Provide: 1) Overall health status, 2) Potential issues, 3) Resource bottlenecks, 4) Optimization recommendations, 5) Alert thresholds
prompts.performance_report: Generate performance report for {time_period}. Metrics: {metrics_data}. Include: 1) Performance trends, 2) Peak usage times, 3) Anomalies detected, 4) Capacity planning suggestions, 5) Executive summary
prompts.alert_setup: Configure monitoring alerts for: {resource_type}. Requirements: 1) Warning threshold: {warning_level}, 2) Critical threshold: {critical_level}, 3) Check frequency: {frequency}, 4) Notification channels: {channels}, 5) Auto-remediation: {auto_fix}
prompts.diagnose_issue: Diagnose this system issue: {symptoms}. System info: {system_info}. Recent logs: {logs}. Provide: 1) Root cause analysis, 2) Impact assessment, 3) Step-by-step fix, 4) Prevention measures, 5) Monitoring recommendations
